title: TexasHoldemAction
description: Action payload for Texas Hold'em, sent as client_action.data when game == 'texas_holdem'. One of five discriminated variants by `type`. Legal actions at any point are enumerated in server_action_request.data.legal_actions; client must pick one of those. Mirrors games/texasholdem/texasholdem.go GetLegalActions() + ValidateAction().

oneOf.description: Surrender the hand. Only legal when there's a bet to call (toCall > 0).
Pass. Only legal when no bet to call (toCall == 0).

amount.description: Chips to call. Must equal server's suggested call amount from legal_actions[call].data.amount. Short-stack auto-caps to remaining chips.

oneOf.description: Match the current bet. Legal only when toCall > 0.

amount.description: Total bet size (NOT the delta). Must be >= min_raise total and <= max (all-in). Server provides min/max in legal_actions[raise].data.{min,max}.

min.description: Echo of server-provided min (not required on outbound).

max.description: Echo of server-provided max (not required on outbound).

oneOf.description: Increase the bet. Not legal when last raise was a short all-in (ShortAllInBet flag blocks further raises this round).
Bet all remaining chips. Legal whenever you have chips. Creates side pot if < current_bet + min_raise (short all-in).
